word: G3836 - πανταχόθεν - pantachóthen - pan-takh-oth'-en - From every quarter

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: From every quarter
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை
from all sides, from every quarter
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Adverb (of source) from G3837; from all directions: - from every quarter.
